title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Robin, King as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Castle interior, third floor banquet hall

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are we ready for an island wide transmis- silon?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Black leg, be a dear and call nice Robin now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've spun several layers of "HARD GUM" web at the entrance and on the floor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll be ensured the moment she sets foot in here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The webs will restrict her movement...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....allowing my subordinates to riddle her with tranquilizers!! After that...()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You just have to call her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: beg her to come and rescue you quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have somewhere else I need to be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I CAN'T HOLD IN MY TEARS ANY- MORE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He'd rather die, if asking for help...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I might have fallen for him if we weren't on different sides-)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to get a word in...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's so defiant... he will probably tell her to "Go to Hell" or something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's never going to give in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: enough already, if you keep angering big sis,

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 37 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
